requirements.title: Use a new provider and region, not NL and not SPB
requirements.acceptance: candidate provider, region, account, and host are documented as non-NL/non-SPB public metadata
requirements.next_step: choose a provider/region/account that is independent from NL and does not reuse SPB

requirements.title: Use a small, boring daily/emergency profile split
requirements.acceptance: daily NL profile remains separate from emergency secondary profile; automatic switching stays disabled
requirements.next_step: document the secondary as an emergency profile only until manual process is tested

requirements.title: Score candidate metadata before choosing a secondary
requirements.acceptance: candidate scorer exists and rejects NL, SPB, placeholders, private addresses, and secret-like material
requirements.next_step: fill secondary-exit-candidates.example.json with public metadata for non-NL/non-SPB candidates

requirements.title: Do not store VPN secrets in repo or reports
requirements.acceptance: only public endpoint metadata is stored; no raw URI, UUID, private key, or bot token
requirements.next_step: generate the future probe config from public metadata only

requirements.title: Expose an independent public TCP health target
requirements.acceptance: probe_secondary_exit.py can reach at least one configured TCP port without touching NL
requirements.next_step: configure a non-secret TCP probe target such as the future public 443 endpoint

requirements.title: Verify exit IP only after manual test-client activation
requirements.acceptance: client exit probe is disabled until a manual test profile is activated on a client
evidence: client probe uses local SOCKS only after manual activation
raw profile secrets remain outside reports
requirements.next_step: after secondary exists, enable client_probe only on a test client and compare expected exit IP

requirements.title: Keep failover manual and reversible
requirements.acceptance: manual approval, rollback path, and return-to-NL verification are documented before any switch
requirements.next_step: write the exact client-side switch and rollback checklist after a real secondary endpoint exists

requirements.title: Use project-local temp space for diagnostic commands
requirements.acceptance: commands that need temporary files can run with TMPDIR=/mnt/projects/.tmp while / is full
requirements.next_step: prefix long local diagnostic/test commands with TMPDIR=/mnt/projects/.tmp until root disk is cleaned

allowed_metadata: expected exit IP only after manual test-client activation
